entities.name: Story Value
entities.context: Belief that candidates who understand the value of stories become stronger candidates

entities.name: Friction for Non-Believers
entities.context: Design principle where deliberate friction filters out candidates who don't align with story-centric approach

entities.name: Messaging Shift
entities.context: Reframing from 'We want your stories' to 'Strong candidates prepare stories' - shifting ownership to candidate

relationships.context: Friction mechanism reinforces and selects for candidates who understand story value
New messaging frames story preparation as candidate responsibility and quality signal
